name: sidebar-nav-items
title: Sidebar Navigation Items
summary: Add emails, webhooks, cron jobs to left sidebar. Currently has analytics, keys — wants the full list displayed.

name: sessions-panel-collapse
title: Sessions Panel - Collapse by Default
summary: Sessions panel on the right looks good but should be collapsed by default.

name: middle-content-no-scroll
title: Middle Content Area - No Horizontal Scroll
summary: Middle area currently scrolls left/right. Should be bounded inside its container — no horizontal overflow.

name: project-name-display
title: Display Project Name Instead of Placeholder
summary: Replace 'Home' placeholder with actual project name. Auto-create CLAUDE.md in project directory. Initial prompt should allow specifying MCPs and skills to include.

name: project-creation-templates
title: Project Creation - MCPs, Skills & Templates
summary: When creating a project, allow specifying which MCPs and skills to include. Possibly offer templates for common setups.

name: session-thread-actions
title: Session Thread Actions - Copy/Resume/Tmux
summary: Session threads need a popover with actions: copy command, resume session, open in tmux. Multiple combinations of actions (CC tmux, etc). Popover should appear on hover/click.

name: sidebar-recent-activities
title: Sidebar - Recent Activities & Work Trees
summary: Left sidebar could show recent activities. Research: if multiple git worktrees exist, can we map which session was used in which worktree?

name: tmux-sessions-integration
title: Tmux Sessions Integration
summary: Display tmux sessions in the UI. Add a button to select a session and open it. Construct the tmux attach command automatically.

name: skills-mcp-status
title: Skills & MCP Status Display
summary: Skills section currently not working. MCP errors should be closeable. Tools display needs fixing. MCP listing works but needs polish.

name: file-tree-improvements
title: File Tree - Open Files & Rich View
summary: File tree should allow opening a file to see its contents. Want a richer view with icons based on file type.

name: tab-interface
title: Tab Interface - Multiple Open Tabs
summary: Add a tab interface to have multiple open tabs. Tabs should persist when navigating between projects.

name: project-scoped-sessions
title: Project-Scoped Sessions
summary: When inside a project, only show sessions for that project — not all sessions from the whole system.

name: railway-linear-integration
title: Railway & Linear Integration
summary: Show Railway deployment info and Linear tickets in project view. Connect Linear project, see deployments and failures. Start a Claude session from a Linear ticket ('work on this ticket') or investigate a failed Railway deployment.
